sentences.arabic: عَلَى الرَّغْمِ مِنَ الثَّوْرَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ، تَبْقَى الْمَكْتَبَةُ الْقَلْبَ النَّابِضَ لِأَيِّ مُؤَسَّسَةٍ تَعْلِيمِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos digitalnoj revoluciji, biblioteka ostaje kucajuće srce svake obrazovne ustanove.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the digital revolution, the library remains the beating heart of any educational institution.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ الْمَكْتَبَةُ مَلَاذًا هَادِئًا حَيْثُ يُمْكِنُ لِلطُّلَّابِ الِانْغِمَاسُ فِي عَالَمِ الْأَدَبِ الْكَلَاسِيكِيِّ وَالْعُلُومِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka pruža mirno utočište gdje se studenti mogu udubiti u svijet klasične književnosti i modernih nauka.
sentences.translationEn: The library provides a quiet sanctuary where students can immerse themselves in the world of classical literature and modern science.

sentences.arabic: يَلْعَبُ أُمَنَاءُ الْمَكْتَبَاتِ دَوْرًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي تَوْجِيهِ الْبَاحِثِينَ نَحْوَ الْمَرَاجِعِ الْأَكْثَرِ دِقَّةً وَأَهَمِّيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Bibliotekari igraju ključnu ulogu u usmjeravanju istraživača prema najpreciznijim i najvažnijim referencama.
sentences.translationEn: Librarians play a pivotal role in guiding researchers toward the most relevant and authoritative references.

sentences.arabic: دَمَجَتِ الْمَكْتَبَاتُ الْمُعَاصِرَةُ تِقْنِيَّاتٍ مُتَقَدِّمَةً لِتَسْهِيلِ الْوُصُولِ إِلَى قَوَاعِدِ الْبَيَانَاتِ الْعَالَمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Savremene biblioteke integrisale su napredne tehnologije kako bi olakšale pristup globalnim bazama podataka.
sentences.translationEn: Modern libraries have integrated advanced technologies to facilitate access to global databases.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا، تَحْفَظُ هَذِهِ الصُّرُوحُ تُرَاثَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ مَعَ تَبَنِّي أَدَوَاتِ الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Tako ova zdanja čuvaju naslijeđe ljudskog znanja dok istovremeno usvajaju alate budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, these structures preserve the legacy of human knowledge while embracing the tools of the future.
